name: Nurse Assignment - CR1
content: Patients are grouped into patient types, and required workload now depends on both patient type and assigned nurse. The workload of a nurse is the sum of type-specific nurse workload values over assigned patients. The objective is modified to jointly minimize total workload and workload dispersion (standard deviation) across nurses.
value_info: `min_patients_per_nurse`: Minimum number of patients per nurse.
`max_patients_per_nurse`: Maximum number of patients per nurse.
`max_workload_per_nurse`: Upper bound on workload per nurse.
`patient_type`: List[int], type index of each patient (0-based).
`patient_zone`: List[int], zone index of each patient.
`workload_by_type_nurse`: 2D List[int] where workload_by_type_nurse[t][k] is effort for nurse k to treat patient type t.

var1.descr: `patient_assignment`: List[int] of length n_patients, where patient_assignment[i] is the assigned nurse for patient i.

var2.descr: `workload`: List[int] of length n_nurses, workload per nurse under type-dependent effort values.

var3.descr: `total_workload`: Integer sum of workloads across all nurses.

var4.descr: `variance_numerator`: Integer workload-dispersion score used to encourage balanced nurse workloads (lower is better).
